hero.desc: Custom marble, granite and porcelain cutting. Full bathroom and kitchen renovations with direct service and competitive prices. From Gandía to Alicante.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonial1.text: "They renovated our entire bathroom and the result was spectacular. Friendly, clean and punctual. 100% recommended."
testimonial1.author: — María G., Gandía
testimonial2.text: "Custom marble countertop for our new kitchen. Perfect measurements, on-time delivery and very competitive price. We will definitely use them again."
testimonial2.author: — Carlos M., Denia
testimonial3.text: "They came to measure, cut everything to the millimetre and installed it without any problem. True professionals. I recommended them to all my family in Jávea."
testimonial3.author: — Inmaculada R., Jávea
brands.title: We work with the best brands on the market
blog.title: Ideas & Tips
blog1.h3: How to choose the perfect countertop for your kitchen
blog1.desc: Marble, granite, porcelain or Silestone: we explain the differences in price, durability and maintenance so you make the right choice.
blog2.h3: Bathroom renovation: what to expect at each stage
blog2.desc: From demolition to the final finish, we tell you how we organise a full renovation so there are no surprises.
blog3.h3: 5 tricks to keep your marble looking brand new
blog3.desc: Marble is easy to care for if you know how. We give you the basic tips to keep it spotless for years.
cta.h2: Shall we talk about your project?
cta.desc: Tell us what you need: new countertop, bathroom renovation, full kitchen... We'll give you a no-obligation quote within 24 hours. Free measurement at your home.
